title: gymnocarpium remotum
intro: Gymnocarpium remotum, also known as the remote or distant moonwort, is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Gymnocarpium remotum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal supplements, and is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine practices.
